tests_written: 7 column-level + 1 combination uniqueness + 1 not-null on actual_lift_pct

root_cause.headline: Three Mid-Atlantic retailers share a promo-execution gap — endcap displays mounted 4 days late at 47 stores; promo signage did not go live during peak BTS shopping.
root_cause.detail: 47 of 52 Mid-Atlantic stores with low lift share a single execution signature: endcap displays were received and mounted an average of 4.1 days after promo start, and digital promo signage went live 3.8 days late. The BTS high-velocity window is the first 5 days of the promo period. Late display placement meant Cardinal snack bars were not at eye level during the peak impulse-buy window. Midwest stores averaged 0.2-day endcap lag and 0.1-day signage lag — execution, not promo design, drove the regional split.
root_cause.affected_cohort: 47 Mid-Atlantic stores across three retail banners — MegaMart, RiverGrove, and BoxBin

without_wizard.label: Without dbt-wizard
without_wizard.summary: Question enters the analytics backlog. CSCO standup proceeds without the root-cause answer.
narrative: VP Demand Planning files the request. It enters the analytics backlog at priority B.
Data engineer scopes the work Monday morning — three days after the standup.
Engineer writes SQL from scratch, joining four silver tables by hand.
Tests, YAML, and schema contract get bolted on at PR time. Sometimes.
Trade planning team cannot isolate root cause before the CSCO standup.
$1.6M in BTS trade spend remains unattributed. Next cycle repeats the miss.

with_wizard.label: With dbt-wizard
with_wizard.summary: Four sub-agents surface the upstreams, author the SQL, write the tests, and materialize the asset in 90 seconds.
narrative: Explorer runs status and search. Returns the four silver upstream candidates.
Summary runs describe and lineage. Confirms join path and names the new grain.
Worker runs dbt_show on a 6-week BTS slice. Validates the proposed grain.
Worker authors fct_lift_by_sku_promo_region_week.sql with CTEs and final SELECT.
Verification writes the YAML — description, schema contract, 9 tests, ownership.
Worker materializes the table to Iceberg. Verification confirms downstream lineage.
VP Demand Planning presents execution root cause at the CSCO standup with data.

hero.label: Root cause identified 10 hours before the CSCO standup — execution audit, not a promo redesign
hero.note: From VP question to materialized Iceberg gold table — versioned, tested, documented, lineage-tracked. The demand planning team now knows the endcap setup lag and signage timing are the gap. The fix is a retailer execution protocol change, not a trade investment redesign.
